options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Level of verbosity for produced text messages
help                  display this list of options.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Make the current directory an Alpheus experiment

commands.name: compute
commands.description:
Tries to compute the graph to make the outdated node
up to date

commands.name: status
commands.description: Prints the graph status for particular .alph file

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save a copy of file/directory to the storage(s)

commands.name: restore
commands.description:
Restore a copy of the file/directory from storage
Use 'alpheus <subcommand> help' for additional information.
